<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Create a FileSpec"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/specs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Register a new FileSpec. The spec drives both the inbound
(File → Events) and optional outbound (Events → File) pipelines.

  id={"request"}
